channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why we’re ushering in a new era in pregnancy health
item.description: Lindsay Orr was active and healthy, running marathons and hiking all around Colorado. During pregnancy, she developed a persistent headache and dangerously high blood pressure—hallmark symptoms of preeclampsia, a leading cause of preterm birth as well as maternal mortality and morbidity.
item.dc:creator: Maneesh Jain, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How farmers are using AI on vineyards to make wine
item.description: When artificial intelligence-backed tractors became available to vineyards, Tom Gamble wanted to be an early adopter. He knew there would be a learning curve, but Gamble decided the technology was worth figuring out. The third-generation farmer bought one autonomous tractor.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Trump administration halts funding for two cybersecurity efforts, including one for elections
item.description: The Trump administration has cut millions of dollars in federal funding from two cybersecurity initiatives, including one dedicated to helping state and local election officials.
item.dc:creator: Christina A. Cassidy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Legacy Programming Languages Make a Comeback in Tiobe Index
item.description: Fortran and Delphi are rising in popularity, according to the latest Tiobe index, driven by companies maintaining vital legacy systems developed with these languages.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Dyson vacuums have one big problem and I don't understand why
item.description: Dyson needs to fix this basic usability issue across its full range, not just the most expensive model.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tesla Shares Plunge Amid Slashed Estimates for Vehicle Deliveries - Bloomberg
item.description: Tesla Inc. shares fall amid Wall Street analysts' revised estimates for vehicle deliveries, citing disruptions and changing consumer preferences.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: HUD is eyeing a crypto experiment. Some government workers are concerned
item.description: This story was originally published by ProPublica. The U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development is considering taking a first step to using cryptocurrency, according to a meeting recording and other materials reviewed by ProPublica and three officials familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Coburn, Fast Company

item.title: X outage affects thousands of users
item.description: An outage on the social platform X appeared to impact thousands of users on Monday morning. According to outage-tracking website Downdetector.com, more than 37,000 users reported problems with the platform shortly before 10 a.m. EDT on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Top Bluetooth chip security flaw could put a billion devices at risk worldwide
item.description: ESPC32 Bluetooth chip, which has been sold in the billions, allegedly allowed remote access and backdoor deployment.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Assassin's Creed Shadows PS5 Pro details have been revealed and the biggest difference appears to be ray tracing
item.description: Playing Assassin's Creed Shadows on PS5 Pro? Expect three performance modes and 'extended' ray tracing.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: UC teams with Bay Area tech company for new lab that hopes to make AI work for artists
item.description: Can a new initiative make peace between human creatives and the technology threatening to displace them?
item.dc:creator: Jenna Ahart, The Mercury News

item.title: At the tactical edge, Army wants 58 zero trust capabilities
item.description: CWO Four Ben Koontz, the director of the Army’s functional management office for zero trust, said a recent pilot successfully tested these cyber tools. The post At the tactical edge, Army wants 58 zero trust capabilities first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Two Bay Area counties lead the state in electric vehicle sales
item.description: Santa Clara and Marin counties held their position among leaders in zero-emission vehicle sales across California in 2024, according to new state data.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Rodriguez, The Mercury News

item.title: JavaScript tools and frameworks we’re watching now
item.description: JavaScript is moving in two directions at once, favoring both comprehensive, full-stack frameworks and greater simplicity. Sometimes these trends are harmonious, and at other times they are at odds. The drive for frameworks and libraries that abstract away complexity is a key point of tension.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump signs executive order creating bitcoin reserve
item.description: President Trump signed an executive order Thursday to create a government reserve of bitcoin along with a "digital asset stockpile" in the administration's latest embrace of the cryptocurrency industry. According to the order, the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: HPE cuts 2,500 jobs, remains committed to Juniper buy, faces tariff issues
item.description: After sharing a mostly positive revenue report for the first quarter of its 2025 fiscal year, HPE executives detailed a number of challenges the company will face in the coming months, including layoffs, a court case over its proposed buy of Juniper Networks, and the U.S. government’s tariff plan.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump says he will 'probably' extend TikTok ban deadline if deal isn't reached in time
item.description: "We have a lot of interest in TikTok. China is going to play a role, so hopefully China will approve of the deal," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Judge denies Musk's move against OpenAI
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: SolarWinds buys Squadcast to speed incident response
item.description: Observability provider SolarWinds announced this week it had signed an agreement to acquire San Francisco-based Squadcast and its incident response technology for an undisclosed amount.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Startup Fractile tackles AI inference bottlenecks with new chip design
item.description: A 29-year-old entrepreneur with a Ph.D in robotics is looking to shake up the AI chip industry with an innovative approach that promises to deliver hardware that is 100 times faster, 10 times cheaper, and 20 times more energy efficient than the Nvidia GPUs that dominate the market today.
item.dc:creator: Network World
